title: 宝塚記念の後に・なんとでっけえ雷鳴よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One runs with everything she's got,
managing to win the Takarazuka Kinen. Even
Tamamo Cross congratulates her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing how assured and focused Tamamo
Cross already is on winning her next race, Inari
One vows to win the Takarazuka Kinen again next
year.
